_note: SELF-HOST repurposing of the RE-RANK 08 schema (D21): each entry = one remaining PROMPT-BUILD/CR, not a product slice. done_sentinel = the disk path whose presence+validity+class-discriminator == that build shipped (orchestrator STEP-0 derived-state key; D14/D20 analog). roadmap_version 6 = operator-directed ledger refresh (2026-06-11) after W6-REAUTHOR-REST 03-hld + 02-adr phases shipped + committed (6171502). roadmap_version 7 = operator-directed actual-state sync (2026-06-11): per-phase progress within W6-REAUTHOR-REST reflected (01-roadmap done + clean-room-verified; 00-aprd CLASSIFIER shipped 1/9) + drift-class lesson (incl. field-NAME variant) + 04-build spot-check TODO integrated into this ledger from now-deleted ephemeral memory (disk = source of truth, D20). Refresh moves all shipped CR-002 entries (W0, W1-W5, W6-REAUTHOR-04BUILD, W1b) into completed[]; remaining_sequence now = the genuinely-unshipped builds only. SCOPED to the CR-002 deterministic-spine wave + the CR-003 registry-fidelity fix; prior delivered waves (greenfield 10, bugfix 8) live on disk (D20), not re-listed. Disk is source of truth — this ledger is informational ordering, not the truth the loop derives from. roadmap_version 8 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd GAP-DETECT re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (5/9). roadmap_version 9 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd QUESTION-GEN re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (6/9). roadmap_version 10 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd RECONCILE re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (7/9). roadmap_version 11 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd SYNTHESIZE re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (8/9). roadmap_version 12 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd VERIFY (LAST role, 9/9) re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified -> W6-REAUTHOR-REST CLOSED, moved to completed[]. DERIVED FRONTIER now = W7-ORCH-SWAP (orchestrator STEP-4.1 resolve+prefill+compute swap). VERIFY lesson: input SEEDED on disk -> field-NAME drift class N/A to input; my Step-1 full input-schema enumeration was re-spec (AB3, ECONOMY-AUDIT caught, trimmed to structure-only — same RECONCILE lesson). Genuine relocation = OUTPUT verification-block shape, landed clean (0 starvation). Planted-defect required corrupting ALL 3 deprecation homes (discriminator + Rule 3 + Rule 3.1) for a conclusive FAIL; defect output schema-VALID yet value-WRONG re-confirms value-parity-not-schema-validity catches it. DERIVED FRONTIER = W6-REAUTHOR-REST (in progress): wave sentinel now prompts/00-aprd/VERIFY.md (still pre-CR) -> wave not done; per-phase disk scan shows 03-hld + 02-adr + 01-roadmap re-authored (done) + 00-aprd 8/9 (CLASSIFIER/CRITIQUE/EXTRACT/EXTRACT-RULES/GAP-DETECT/QUESTION-GEN/RECONCILE/SYNTHESIZE), so the NEXT + LAST role = VERIFY. RECONCILE = SECOND markdown-vs-no lesson: its INPUT is seeded on disk, so the field-NAME drift class does NOT apply to inputs (runner reads real keys) — relocating output-SHAPE cues (kind enum, corroboration, reconcile_meta tallies) into steps 3/4/5 is the genuine home; a full input-schema enumeration in Step 1 is re-spec (AB3, ECONOMY-AUDIT caught it, trimmed). NEW DRIFT SUB-CLASS (latent-ambiguity-unmasked): a dropped inline schema can also remove a worked-example whose number was STALE (topics_reconciled:9 vs golden 10) AND whose surrounding cue was vague enough to let the runner re-derive the wrong value; fix = sharpen the cue's derivation source (count from INPUT rules[], not agreed[]), never re-add the schema/example. Both-directions tooling re-confirmed: a tier-precedence defect was INEFFECTIVE until ALL redundant homes ('tier 1>2>3' + 'executable canon is least-surprise default' + the 2 leads) were corrupted consistently. QUESTION-GEN is the FIRST markdown-output role re-authored (output 05-questions.md has NO registry schema): outputs[].schema=null, the inline ## Output template is KEPT as the sole structural home (no JSON ## Output schema to drop -> the example-loss/field-NAME drift class did not apply to output; proactively relocated the INPUT field-names into Task-step-1 prose since the dropped inputs: format-prose was their home). Drift class NOT triggered (clean first-pass, like GAP-DETECT). NEW LESSON (both-directions tooling, not a prompt drift): a value-defect planted in only Rule2+step3 was INEFFECTIVE because the ≤6 cap is restated in the ## Output template (3 redundant prose homes) and the runner honored the template; a conclusive planted-defect FAIL required corrupting the cap in ALL homes (cap=4 -> 4Q+9assumptions vs golden 6Q+7assumptions). W1b-REGISTRY-ENRICH shipped (schemas.lock v2: description on every property, element shapes tightened). The example-loss drift class surfaced during 03-hld (a dropped inline-schema EXAMPLE carried derivation value W1b's descriptions did not; relocate to prompt prose, never re-add a schema) is now applied proactively per phase. DRIFT CLASS (durable, integrated from ephemeral notes): dropping an inline `## Output schema` can lose either a derivation-value EXAMPLE or the SOLE prose-home of output field NAMES; both pass registry validation yet drift clean-room value-parity vs golden. Fix = relocate the cue (which-fields + derivation logic) into Task-steps prose; never re-add a schema, never assume registry descriptions substitute. Field-NAME variant verified on 00-aprd CLASSIFIER (runner invented SR-001/verbatim/wrong escape shape until prose named the keys + id format). OUTSTANDING: W6-REAUTHOR-04BUILD spot-check for the same drift (it shipped before the class was understood). roadmap_version 13 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after W7-ORCH-SWAP shipped: orchestrator STEP-4.1 wired to resolve+prefill+compute+validate around the LLM fill (D25/D26), replacing parse-frontmatter. W7 moved to completed[]; DERIVED FRONTIER now = W9-ECON-RECONCILE (terminal economy sweep), then W8-PACK-GATE. W7 LESSON: this was a SPINE edit not a stochastic-island deliverable -> controller authored it directly (P3 'fix the spine once'), the RM11 'never hand-author the deliverable' carve-out applies (the deliverable in the normal loop is a role prompt; the orchestrator IS the control loop). Verify was the regression-guard (resolve/prefill/validate exercised end-to-end against real _fixtures both directions), not a single-role clean-room. The 2 inherited caveman-footer-dup (AB1) lint findings are baseline debt (the shipped orchestrator already carried them at the same lines) -> NOT a W7 regression, deferred to W9 per defer-not-chase; deleting either over-strips a load-bearing canonical-block reference (STEP-3 names the block IMPLEMENT authors against + RULES restates PR4 = two distinct homes, a probable lint heuristic mis-fire W9 should calibrate to routes_to:canon). roadmap_version 14 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after W9-ECON-RECONCILE shipped + rescoped: lint 44/44 clean (C8 calibrated to exclude canon-bundle range-refs; C6 calibrated to count escapes-overlap only from FAILURE-exit lines — the prior W7-flagged _orchestrator C8 was indeed the mis-fire, now fixed at the checker) + _step-runner C4 'just' fixed via IMPLEMENT+clean-room + selftest 24-check both-directions proof. W9 moved to completed[]; DERIVED FRONTIER now = W10-ECON-SWEEP-FULL (full 44-prompt L2 reconcile), then W8-PACK-GATE (now depends on W10). W9 RESCOPE: Layer-2 audit on the 4 touched surfaced 15 INHERITED findings (0 from the W9 edit) -> operator chose close-W9 + roll-15-into-W10 over re-authoring content-untouched verified prompts (defer-not-chase + avoid W10 overlap). The 15 catalogued in .roadmap/09-economy-reconcile.json rolled_to.inherited_findings; ~half are defensible auditor mis-fires (dual-mode cross-ref / ADR-0010 emphasis / orientation header) so W10's FIRST job = calibrate _economy-audit Rule-2, THEN re-author genuine residue. PRIORITY: _step-runner I2 starvation (only UNDER-direction finding).

Only genuine prompt debt = _step-runner C4 (1-word DELETE via IMPLEMENT; behavioral surface Hard-rules/Register/Final-reply byte-identical -> clean-room behavior provably unchanged). W9 LESSON: a 'terminal economy sweep' scoped to N touched prompts still inherits the full corpus-wide L2 backlog ON those N; the auditor over-flags dual-mode cross-refs + deliberate ADR-0010 emphasis + orientation headers (same false-positive CLASS as the ledger's MODEL-DATA Register-starvation) -> W10 must reconcile corpus-wide WITH _economy-audit Rule-2 calibration, NOT piecemeal re-author. The lint calibrations are the durable W9 deliverable; the prompt-debt reconcile is W10's.
